meaning: n.女祭司,(基督教会以外的)神职人员
examples: Janis Joplin was known as the High Priestess of Rock.
What game are you playing, priestess?
Sentinel, I would speak with your High Priestess.
The most stunning sculptural creativity in the show is a nineteenth-century wooden statue of a dancing priestess.
Taking center stage in the lighting ceremony was Greek actress Ino Menegaki as the traditional high priestess.
